title: Skill frontmatter spec (step-1 default — REPLACE with your internal spec)
description: Canonical definition of a skill's SKILL.md frontmatter. This is one of the two swap points: replace this file with your organization's real skill spec and update tools/lint.py to match.

name.description: kebab-case identifier; must equal the skill's directory name

description.description: What it does and WHEN to use it. The harness selects skills by this text, so invest here.

version.description: Semantic version. Bump on every change so the hub can pin and roll back.

owner.description: Team or person accountable for this skill. Drives anti-rot and audit.

allowed-tools.description: Optional least-privilege tool allowlist. Declared here, ENFORCED by the harness — not by the hub.
